subcodes.first_line: O learned one of the divine school! Among the friends, as is meet and befitting, love and fellowship and oneness [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ادیب دبستان الهی در میان دوستان چنانکه باید و شاید محبت و الفت و یگانگی و
subcodes.subjects: @love, unity, and fellowship among the friends; in the Cause, @suffering and imprisonment, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
